title: Limits' Grapple
description: Adds a grappling hook that lets you swing around and just have fun :)
body:
![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/d/752/d7520aad7b566a726dfa26e6bae37861721148fa47fb2adc016f466a806687d5ecc987d687fc2707b1e1e1168712a9517aba33aec74649bf0a6fe80eb0b8203e)

This is a quick mod originally made for ModFest: Singularity, a 1-week long mod jam for Quilt.
Adds a new grappling hook item which lets you swing around and just have fun :)
Try it out in an amplified world!

Known issues:
- Some animations can break in certain situations related to using the offhand swap key while grappling

Future planned features:
- Netherite upgrade
- Better sounds

Possible future features:
- Grappling entities?
